title: Gramada
summary:
Gramada may refer to:

Gramada, Bulgaria
Gramada (Bujanovac), village in the municipality of Bujanovac, Serbia
Gramada (mountain)
Gramada (Svrljig), a mountain pass between Niš and Svrljig
Ion Grămadă, Bukovinian Romanian writer
